steps.title: Interpret the function notation h(1.4) = 1.64
steps.content:
$h(x)$ represents height in feet at time $x$ seconds.
The notation $h(1.4) = 1.64$ means: when $x = 1.4$ seconds, we have $h(x) = 1.64$ feet.
In words: at 1.4 seconds after being thrown, the height is 1.64 feet.

steps.title: Match to the correct choice
steps.content:
Choice A states: The height of the object 1.4 seconds after being thrown straight up in the air is 1.64 feet.
This is exactly our interpretation from step 1.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
